notes.dmOnlyHint: The scribe inbox is only visible to the DM.
notes.noAccess: You don't have access to this campaign
notes.inboxIntro: Raw notes from the table. Resolve each one into the entity it belongs to — or let Claude sweep them for you.
notes.inboxClearHint: No open items — nothing waiting to be resolved.
notes.noHistoryHint: Resolved items land here, linked to the entities they became.
notes.resolveLinked: , linked to the entity it became
notes.lostAccessTitle: You no longer have access to this campaign
notes.myNotesIntro: Private by default. Share a note with the DM or the whole party — tap the badge to change who sees it.
notes.draftPlaceholderPrivate: Jot something down… saves as private
notes.whisperOnlyThey: Only they (and the DM) will see this.
notes.noMatchHint: Nothing found for "{{query}}". Try a different word.
notes.perUserExplainer: Notes are per-user: the DM cannot read private notes (API-enforced). Sharing a note with the DM notifies them (it shows in their notification bell) and lands under their "Shared with me"; shared-with-party notes appear on entity pages for everyone. A 🤫 whisper reaches exactly one player (plus the DM) — the per-player secret channel for "only the rogue notices the trap door".
